title: Tokyo Ghoul
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12, faithfully adapting ch 1-66) + √A (S2, 12 eps, cumulative 13-24; anime-original ending diverging from the manga). Manga complete at 144 chapters (Part 1 only). The Tokyo Ghoul:re sequel manga + 2018 anime are separate AniList entries and not covered here.
